revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:8 nguŏk 6 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:8月6日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 8월 6일]][[zh-min-nan:8 goe̍h 6 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:八月初六]][[zh:八月初六]]
{{Not to be confused with|August 6|qq=August 6}}
<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=八月初六|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 8월 6일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar August|qq=}} '''August 6''' is the 6th day of the month {{ill|August (Lunisolar)|ja|8月 (旧暦)|lt=August (Hazuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/August (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 8th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senshū|qid=Q96759839|1=senshū}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}. == Events == * {{ill|Enbun|en|Enbun|qid=Q1145071|lt=Enbun|1=Enbun}} 4th year / {{ill|Zhengping|en|Zhengping|qid=Q11123413|lt=Shōhei|1=Zhengping}} 14th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1359|en|1359|qid=Q6143|lt=1359|1=1359}} {{ill|August 29|en|August 29|qid=Q2816|lt=August 29|1=August 29}}) – {{ill|Battle of the Chikugo River|ja|筑後川の戦い|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Battle of the Chikugo River|1=Battle of Chikugo River|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11602809}}. The {{ill|Southern Court|ja|南朝|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Southern Court|qq=}} side, led by {{ill|Prince Kaneyoshi|en|Prince Kaneyoshi|qid=Q11074321|lt=Prince Kairaku|1=Prince Kaneyoshi}} and others, clashed with the Northern Court side—with 少弍頼尚 among its Ranks—and achieved victory in a night attack. == Births == * {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|qid=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō|1=Tenpō}} 13th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1841|en|1841|qid=Q7622|lt=1841|1=1841}} {{ill|September 10|en|September 10|qid=Q2853|lt=September 10|1=September 10}}) – {{ill|Yasushi Nomura|en|Yasushi Nomura|qid=Q2596164|lt=Nomura Yasushi|1=Yasushi Nomura}}, a {{ill|Politician|en|Politician|qid=Q82955|lt=politician|1=Politician}} (died {{ill|1909|en|1909|qid=Q2057|lt=1909|1=1909}}). * {{ill|Kōka|en|Kōka|qid=Q1325317|lt=Kōka|1=Kōka}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1845|en|1845|qid=Q7636|lt=1845|1=1845}} {{ill|September 7|en|September 7|qid=Q2852|lt=September 7|1=September 7}}) – {{ill|Senge Takatomi|en|Senge Takatomi|qid=Q11405449|lt=Senke Sonpuku|1=Senge Takatomi}}, a religious leader and politician (died {{ill|1929|en|1929|qid=Q18792|lt=1929|1=1929}}). * (AD) {{ill|1946|en|1946|qid=Q18610|lt=1946|1=1946}} ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} 1946 {{ill|September 1|en|September 1|qid=Q2859|lt=September 1|1=September 1}}) – {{ill|Roh Moo-hyun|en|Roh Moo-hyun|qid=Q14345|lt=Roh Moo-hyun|1=Roh Moo-hyun}}, the 16th {{ill|President of South Korea|ja|大韓民国大統領|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/President of South Korea|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 大統領 (大韓民国)|1=President of South Korea|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q6296418}}. == Deaths == * {{ill|Bunryaku|en|Bunryaku|qid=Q1194125|lt=Bunreki|1=Bunryaku}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1234|en|1234|qid=Q5424|lt=1234|1=1234}} {{ill|August 31|en|August 31|qid=Q2830|lt=August 31|1=August 31}}) – {{ill|Emperor Go-Horikawa|en|Emperor Go-Horikawa|qid=Q357221|lt=Emperor Gohorikawa|1=Emperor Go-Horikawa}}, the 86th {{ill|Emperor of Japan|en|Emperor of Japan|qid=Q208233|lt=Emperor of Japan|1=Emperor of Japan}} (born {{ill|1212|en|1212|qid=Q5255|lt=1212|1=1212}}). * {{ill|Kyōhō|en|Kyōhō|qid=Q1145048|lt=Kyōhō|1=Kyōhō}} 17th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1732|en|1732|qid=Q6966|lt=1732|1=1732}} {{ill|September 24|en|September 24|qid=Q2890|lt=September 24|1=September 24}}) – {{ill|Emperor Reigen|en|Emperor Reigen|qid=Q313808|lt=Emperor Reigen|1=Emperor Reigen}}, the 112th Emperor (born {{ill|1654|en|1654|qid=Q6970|lt=1654|1=1654}}).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|8|5|8|7|7|6|9|8|0806|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

[[ko:음력 8월 6일]] [[ja:8月6日 (旧暦)]] [[zh:八月初六]]
[[ar:August 6 (Lunisolar)]]
